# Recommended regression tests. One pytest target per line.
# Parsed by the `select-recommended-tests` job in `.github/workflows/pr_test.yaml`.
## Supported formats:
#   tests/e2e/pull_request/one_card/test_foo.py
#   tests/e2e/pull_request/one_card/test_foo.py::TestClass::test_method
#   tests/ut/attention/a2/test_attention_v1.py

tests/e2e/pull_request/one_card/test_batch_invariant.py
tests/ut/attention/test_attention_mask.py
tests/e2e/pull_request/two_card/test_flashcomm_distributed.py::test_qwen3_dense_prefetch_mlp_weight_tp2
